subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have revealed the Book of Names, and commanded those named therein to believe in God, the All-Knowing, and We have enjoined them to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا کتاب الاسماء و امرنا مسمیاتها ان یومنوا بالله العلیم و وصیناهم ان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
